data.body: STATE: CLOSED + green. Change 649 (Gerrit) Verified+1 + LLM-Review+1; completion-verifier attestation signed. Delivered src/rebar/attest/opcert.py (rebar.opcert.v1 kind: DSSE+SSHSIG/Ed25519, in-toto subject binding {ticket_id, material_fingerprint, merged_log_commit, kind}, explicit-SHA era validity, two-phase verdict) + registration in attest/__init__.py. Held-out TDD (test_attest_opcert{,_heldout}.py) + mutation-checked. Kind-confusion security fix (bind kind into signed subject) added here after review. On the current-main-rebased stack; ready to submit.
